title: Baby Cost Calculator - First Year Expenses
description: Free baby cost calculator. Estimate the cost of having a baby in the first year including diapers, formula, childcare, and gear.
keywords: baby cost calculator, cost of having a baby, baby expenses, first year baby costs, newborn budget
intro: Estimate first-year baby costs. Select your choices for feeding, childcare, and gear to see a personalized cost breakdown.

faq.q: How much does a baby cost in the first year?
faq.a: The average first-year cost is $12,000-$15,000 without childcare, or $25,000-$35,000 with full-time daycare.

faq.q: What is the biggest baby expense?
faq.a: Childcare is typically the largest expense ($800-$2,500/month). Without childcare, diapers and formula are the biggest recurring costs.

faq.q: How can I reduce baby costs?
faq.a: Breastfeed if possible, buy secondhand gear, use cloth diapers, accept hand-me-downs, and compare daycare options.
